name: public-knowledge-sources
description: Local subprocess retrieval plugin for public biomedical knowledge sources.

sources.label: NCBI Gene
sources.description: Gene ID, symbol, organism, and genomic location metadata via NCBI E-utilities.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI E-utilities db=gene calls; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: retmax
parameters.description: Maximum NCBI Gene records to request.

sources.label: Ensembl
sources.description: Gene, transcript, stable ID, and variant lookup via the public Ensembl REST API.
riskNotes: Read-only public Ensembl REST API; no credential projection required.

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: Ensembl xref object type, default gene.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum matching stable IDs to resolve.

sources.label: UniProt
sources.description: Protein function, sequence, GO, and cross-reference metadata via UniProtKB REST APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public UniProt REST API; no credentials required.

interface.shortDescription: NCBI Gene, Ensembl, and UniProt as local retrieval plugins
interface.longDescription: Moves public biomedical knowledge source execution for NCBI Gene, Ensembl, and UniProt behind Omiga's local search/query/fetch subprocess route protocol.
defaultPrompt: Query NCBI Gene for TP53 in Homo sapiens through the knowledge plugin.
Fetch an Ensembl stable ID through the knowledge plugin.
Search UniProt for reviewed BRCA1 proteins.
